title: AfriLearn Ghana Dataset Row
description: Schema for NaCCA Ghana Standards-Based Curriculum training examples. Every row must validate against this schema before entering the training pipeline.

instruction.description: Task contract including NaCCA strand/sub-strand anchor. Must contain all required tags.

input.description: Runtime student context. Must contain all required state fields.

output.description: Ground truth response. Must contain QUESTION, CORRECT_ANSWER, DIFFICULTY, and CURRICULUM_REF.

examples.instruction: COUNTRY: Ghana | SUBJECT: Mathematics | GRADE: Basic 4 | PHASE: Upper Primary | STRAND: Number | SUB_STRAND: Fractions | CONTENT_STANDARD: B4.1.3.1 | DIFFICULTY: medium | TASK: Generate one multiple-choice question aligned to NaCCA B4 Mathematics Strand: Number, Sub-strand: Fractions.
examples.input: student_age: 9 | session_streak: 1_correct | last_topic_score: 55% | prior_sub_strand: whole_numbers | device_locale: Ghana
examples.output:
QUESTION: What is one half of 20?
A) 5
B) 8
C) 10
D) 15

CORRECT_ANSWER: C
EXPLANATION: One half means divide by 2. 20 ÷ 2 = 10.
DIFFICULTY: medium
CURRICULUM_REF: NACCA-GH-MATH-B4-NUMBER-FRACTIONS-B4.1.3.1
